//: LIA-401/B1: compiles container/agent-runner/src/tool-broker.ts (+ its local deps tool-summarize.ts/tool-audit.ts/schedule-validator.ts, pulled in transitively) to .js IN PLACE, so the compiled production host service (node dist/, no TS loader) can load it via the dynamic import in src/agent-runtimes/tool-broker-langchain-adapter.ts. Standalone (no extends) to avoid the base tsconfig's outDir:./dist + rootDir:./src, which would misdirect emit and reject files outside src/ (TS6059) -- same rootDir/outDir mismatch class tsconfig.skills.json already solves this way. Compiled .js is gitignored; npm run build regenerates it. Does NOT replace container/agent-runner's OWN separate build (container/agent-runner/tsconfig.json, used by container/build.sh for the Docker image) -- that build targets the container and is untouched by this file.
